nodes.name: Tawny grassbird
nodes.summary: Tawny grassbird（Tawny grassbird，学名 Cincloramphus timoriensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、湿地。

links.target: loc-阿尔弗雷德-拉塞尔-华莱士-f71e7f5e
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The tawny grassbird (Cincloramphus timoriensis) is a large songbird that is a member of the family Locustellidae commonly found in grassland and reedbed habitats

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They call often with "loud, grumpy churring calls and a longer call that starts tick-tick-tick-tick and ends with an explosive descending trill". The tawny grassbird has 10 identified sub-species found in Australia, Indonesia, Papua New Guinea and the Philippines

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They call often with "loud, grumpy churring calls and a longer call that starts tick-tick-tick-tick and ends with an explosive descending trill". The tawny grassbird has 10 identified sub-species found in Australia, Indonesia, Papua New Guinea and the Philippines

links.label: 分布于

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They call often with "loud, grumpy churring calls and a longer call that starts tick-tick-tick-tick and ends with an explosive descending trill". The tawny grassbird has 10 identified sub-species found in Australia, Indonesia, Papua New Guinea and the Philippines

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Within Australia the tawny grassbird is mainly found on "coastal lowlands in rank grasslands, sedges reeds and rushes" and bordering wetlands In 2011 a population of tawny grassbirds was located in Alice Springs, almost a 100 km from other populations. Generally, grassbirds found in inland Eastern Australia are little grassbirds
